manufacturing.insight: Residual feature transforms a global detector into a contextual one.

credit_card.insight: Mahalanobis assumes Gaussian; credit card fraud is multimodal — IF wins.

network.insight: Time encoding (sin/cos) gives Mahalanobis contextual awareness automatically.

key_conclusions: Feature engineering, not algorithm complexity, determines contextual anomaly detection quality.
Mahalanobis on residuals = contextual detector. On raw features = global detector.
Isolation Forest is the right default for global outliers (credit card, high-dim PCA features).
No single algorithm wins all three datasets — matching algorithm to anomaly type matters.
